text: malba96: Here Senior ML engineer. It helped us to accelerate our internal platform development by improving the scalability of our model router so it can dispatch millions of requests to our internal ML models and a frontend on top so business can interact with the different solutions we develop on our AI team. 20%MurseJ: Every app I pay a sub for I just have my agents build it. Once it's good enough I delete the sub. space-space: Send a prompt that builds a prompt, then does what the prompt entails and if the prompt is not sufficient have it update the prompt automatically please thanks. George Alexander: I built a brain rot crypto tracker that has so many colors and all and lets you track whatever coin you want. Just out of curiosity and boredom tbh.
context: Comments from a TikTok video asking what did you build with AI
